title: Kuehne+Nagel India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kuehne+Nagel India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
